summary: End-to-end backend testing for School Timetable Management. 20/20 pytest tests passed covering health, auth (mongosh-injected session), schools CRUD, basic seed (44 teachers UPPERCASE + idempotency), deep seed (30 subjects + 43 classes + 666 allotments + 39 rules + idempotency=0 on 2nd call), stats, generic master CRUD (teachers + subjects) with abbreviation auto-uppercase on POST/PUT, timetable upsert with teacher_clash detection, GET by class, DELETE cell, substitution suggester (correct ranking, excludes absent teacher, AI commentary returned), substitutions CRUD, NL constraint parser via Claude Sonnet 4.5, and logout. No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE /api/schools/{id} cascades to many collections - good. But /seed/sri-ma-vidyalaya/full uses a fixed school name lookup which could collide if a user creates a school with the same name manually.
Substitution suggester loops N teachers and runs an extra count_documents per teacher per cell (O(cells * teachers) DB hits). Acceptable for current scale but should be batched for production-scale.
NL constraint parser only returns raw Claude output (no JSON validation). Frontend will need to parse + handle malformed JSON.
Logout reads session_token from cookie only; Bearer-token-only clients cannot logout server-side. Consider also accepting Authorization header.
make_master_routes defines endpoints in a closure - works but no per-resource validation (e.g. anyone can POST to /allotments without referential integrity check on class_id/subject_id).
server.py is ~860 lines - approaching the 700-line threshold; consider splitting models, auth, masters, timetable, AI into separate modules.
test_credentials: Sessions injected via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md; first user role manually set to 'Super Admin'.
seed_data_creation: Tests invoke /api/seed/sri-ma-vidyalaya and /api/seed/sri-ma-vidyalaya/full to populate Sri Ma Vidyalaya CBSE School (44 teachers, 30 subjects, 43 classes, 666 allotments, 39 rules). Idempotency verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py with conftest.py fixture that injects a Super Admin session via direct Mongo write. Run: `MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py -v`. Tests use the existing Sri Ma Vidyalaya school for masters/timetable tests, so they are safe to re-run. TEST_ prefixed schools/users are cleaned up post-run.
